description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named p4c-lint that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups to main. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job that checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Python, and uses ccache with a max size of 1000M. Then, build the project with a custom script, run cpplint, clang-format, black, and isort on the code.
